overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic cyberpunk city environment. The character traverses neon-lit sidewalks, crosses streets, walks through covered urban canyons, and ascends to an upper level revealing a homeless encampment. Bright morning sunlight creates strong shadows against the industrial architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial sidewalk with neon storefronts

events.description: purple sports car drives past on the left side of the street
approaching crosswalk to cross the street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk past bright neon storefronts

notable_agents.action: purple sports car driving along the street parallel to the sidewalk

entered.detail: bright pink and green neon signs advertising businesses on the ground floor
distinctive orange textured sidewalk tiles characteristic of the city
tall industrial chimney emitting white smoke against the blue sky

segments.scene_description: Walking along a covered commercial sidewalk with distinctive orange pavement and vibrant neon storefront signs on the right. A purple sports car passes by on the left as the character approaches a crosswalk, with industrial buildings and smokestacks visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street intersection with pedestrian crosswalk

events.description: stepping onto yellow-striped crosswalk to cross the street
entering deeply shaded area under overhead industrial structures

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at the crosswalk toward the opposite sidewalk

notable_agents.action: pedestrian crossing the street in the same direction toward the shaded corridor

entered.detail: broad yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing markings
large concrete building with red STOP lettering on the facade
metal pedestrian bridge connecting buildings overhead

segments.scene_description: Crossing the wide street at a yellow-striped crosswalk, transitioning from the covered sidewalk into open sunlight before entering a deeply shaded urban corridor. The concrete building ahead features prominent STOP signage and overhead industrial walkways cast shadows across the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered urban canyon with overhead pedestrian bridges

events.description: approaching yellow staircase entrance on the left side of the street

agents.ego_description: walking through the shaded urban canyon toward the distant staircase

entered.detail: bright yellow elevated pedestrian bridge spanning the street ahead
storefront with green neon signage and seating area on the sidewalk
network of industrial metal catwalks and bridges overhead

segments.scene_description: Walking through a narrow urban canyon with towering concrete walls and extensive overhead metal walkways blocking most of the sky. A bright yellow pedestrian overpass spans the street ahead, while neon signs and storefronts line the shaded corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor staircase with yellow railings between industrial buildings

events.description: beginning to ascend the steep yellow-railed staircase
reaching the top of the stairs and entering the upper level platform

agents.ego_description: climbing the steep concrete staircase with yellow railings to reach the upper level

entered.detail: steep concrete stairs with bright yellow painted railings on both sides
concrete wall covered in graffiti tags and street art alongside the stairs

segments.scene_description: Ascending a steep outdoor staircase with distinctive bright yellow railings, moving between tall concrete buildings. Graffiti-covered walls line the stairwell as the character climbs toward an upper level platform.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper level homeless encampment under overpass with graffiti

events.description: discovering homeless encampment with person lying on mattress under tarp
passing burning trash barrel and prominent graffiti reading mercy is for the weak

agents.ego_description: exploring the upper level homeless encampment area slowly

notable_agents.action: person lying on mattress under green tarp shelter

entered.detail: makeshift shelter constructed from green and blue tarps supported by wooden posts
metal barrel with open fire burning inside providing heat
dirty mattress on the ground with blankets and personal belongings

segments.scene_description: Exploring an upper level area under an overpass that serves as a homeless encampment. The scene features a person lying on a mattress under a green tarp shelter, a burning trash barrel providing warmth, and prominent graffiti on the concrete wall reading 'MERCY IS FOR THE WEAK' and 'DIE DIE DIE BROKEN'.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a vibrant, neon-lit commercial district into the gritty, shaded depths of an industrial urban canyon and up toward a secluded slum. It begins along a covered sidewalk with orange pavement and glowing storefronts, passing a purple sports car before moving across a yellow-striped crosswalk into bright sunlight. As the camera enters a deeply shaded corridor, the open sky is replaced by towering concrete walls and a network of overhead metal walkways and yellow pedestrian overpasses. The scene then shifts upward as the camera ascends a steep staircase with bright yellow railings and graffiti-covered walls, climbing between massive buildings toward an upper platform. Finally, the movement leads under a concrete overpass into a homeless encampment, where a burning trash barrel and tarp shelters sit beside walls marked with aggressive graffiti.
